text: Figure S1. PRDX1 expression in various pancreatic cells and inflammation infiltration of pancreas in indicated groups. (A) The expression of PRDX1 in acinar, insulin and duct cells (n=4). B-C. Macrophage (marked by CD68) and neutrophil (marked by Ly6G) number in pancreas in AAV8-ctrl, AAV8-Prdx1, AAV8-ctrl+Caerulein, AAV8-Prdx1+Caerulein groups. Data = Mean ± SD (n=3). Statistical analysis was performed by GraphPad Prism (9.5.0). One-way ANOVA using the Tukey’s multiple-comparison test was applied for comparison among three groups. ctrl, control; *P<0.05; ***P<0.001. n.s. = not significant.
